description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On February 22nd, a test vehicle operating in manual mode was traveling East-bound on Evelyn Avenue in Mountain View and ran over 
road debris that was projected upward, scratching the test-vehicle’s driver-side door.  No injuries were reported and law enforcement was 
not called to the scene.
Print
Clear Form
